Select.items: {path: 'employee>/ZSTATE', sorter: { path: 'STATE_ID', descending: false }, filters: [ { path: 'STATUS', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'ACTIVE' }]}

Input.value: { path: 'claim>/claim_item/tips', type: 'FloatType', formatOptions: { minFractionDigits: 2, maxFractionDigits: 2, preserveDecimals: false } }
